3. Department of Justice (DOJ) has concluded its roughly three-month investigation into Chairman Jerome Powell.

title: Senator Bernie Sanders Issues Warning on AI’s Existential Threat
summary:
1. Sanders stressed that even as most AI scientists acknowledge the possibility of AI escaping control and becoming a danger to our existence, no major measures have been taken to avoid it.
2. “We must make certain that Al benefits humanity, not hurts us,” he stated.

title: Chainalysis: EU’s New Sanctions on Russia Mark ‘a New Era’ of Crypto Enforcement
summary:

The blockchain intelligence agency highlighted that the recently issued sanctions package against Russia was perhaps the most comprehensive crypto-focused action by the EU, targeting the whole Russian cryptocurrency sector rather than individual actors, including the digital ruble in full and the RUBx token.

title: New post from Donald Trump
summary:
1. Lee and Kim Greenwood, two of the most spectacular people, had their first grandchild on April 17th.
2. They were with me from the very beginning - Total loyalty, and Lee gave me the greatest walk on song of all time, nothing even close!!!
3. Congratulations to you both!!!
author: Trump Truth
